name: Jumpignons
author: Poki
description: Prepare for a race in Jumpignons! In this fungi-filled platformer, you have to run and platform through a small area and get to the exit. Sounds simple, but every time you make it to the exit, a new obstacle is added to the level - making your next run even harder. Compete with other players to see who can get to the exit the most times before the timer runs out! Each level you finish earns you coins that you can spend to make your mushroom the coolest around. Will you become the fastest fungus in Jumpignons? How to play Jumpignons? Use Spacebar to jump! Press Spacebar twice for a double jump! Who created Jumpignons? Jumpignons was created by Havana24. Play their other games on Poki: Hefty Shaman Deluxe , Break the Siesta and Tired to Fall ! How can I play Jumpignons for free? You can play Jumpignons for free on Poki. Can I play Jumpignons on mobile devices and desktop? Jumpignons can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
